# Security Policy

## Supported Versions

Only the latest version of ADESTIO receives security updates. We strongly encourage all users to stay up-to-date.

| Version | Supported          |
| ------- | ------------------ |
| 1.0.x   | :white_check_mark: |
| < 1.0   | :x:                |

## Reporting a Vulnerability

Please do not report security vulnerabilities through public GitHub issues.

Instead, please send an email to aprilenunzio88@gmail.com. We will evaluate the report and respond within 48 hours.
If the vulnerability involves a potential bypass of the **Universal Container Sandboxing** or the **RBAC (Role-Based Access Control)** system, please mention it explicitly in the subject line.
